# Rupay Credit Card
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=RUPY&Lgcode=MKTG&mc_id=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_banner_applynow&icid=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_banner_applynow "Apply Now")
![banner-logo](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/mr-banner-lg-1920?fmt=webp-alpha)
  * At HDFC Bank, we offer Credit Cards with a range of benefits and rewards, powered by the secure RuPay payment network. HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Cards come in different variants suited to your unique needs and preferences. You can choose from categories like travel, shopping, business and more. Enjoy the benefits of redeemable reward points, get deals on travel bookings, lifestyle brands and much more.
  * What’s more, RuPay Credit Cards are now enabled for Unified Payment Interface (UPI) payments. You can easily link your RuPay Credit Card with [UPI apps(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html) and start earning rewards for your UPI transactions. Choose HDFC Bank RuPay Card to get a secure and rewarding credit experience.


##  Rupay Credit cards 
###  PIXEL Play Credit Card 
  * The Born Digital Range of Credit Cards
  * 5% CashBack on choice of any 2 Packs - Dining & Entertainment Category – BookMyShow & Zomato, Travel Category – MakeMyTrip & Uber, Grocery Category – Blinkit & Reliance Smart Bazaar, Electronics Category – Croma & Reliance Digital, Fashion Category – Nykaa & Myntra
  * 3% CashBack on choice of any one e-commerce merchant - Amazon or Flipkart or PayZapp
  * 1% Unlimited CashBack on all spends*
  * 1% Cashback on UPI Spends (Applicable only on PIXEL RuPay Credit Card holders)
  * Customize your card reflecting your lifestyle by choosing a card design and a billing cycle that suits you
  * Apply & Control your PIXEL Credit Card on PayZapp


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=ZETA&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=rupay_cc_subcatpg_pixel_play_applyonline&icid=rupay_cc_subcatpg_pixel_play_applyonline "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/pixel-play-credit-card "Know More")
![image](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pixel-play-b?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card 
  * Welcome to the new world of ‘Credit + Convenience’ with HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card, enabled for UPI payments
  * 3% Cashpoints on Groceries, SuperMarket & Dining spends & all PayZapp transactions. (Maximum of 500 Points can be earned in a calendar month)
  * 2% Cashpoints on Utility spends (Maximum of 500 Points can be earned in a calendar month)
  * 1% Cashpoints on other spends (Excluding Rent, Wallet loads, EMI, Fuel & Government categories) (Maximum of 500 Points can be earned in a calendar month)


[Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/hdfc-bank-upi-rupay-credit-card "Know More")
![image](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfc-aem-microsites/new-credit-card-amp/cards/UPI-RuPay-Card-Fascia.png)
###  IRCTC HDFC Bank Credit Card 
  * Experience the convenience and perks of train travel like never before.
  * Get 5 Reward Points for every ₹100 spent on IRCTC ticketing website and Rail Connect App.
  * Earn 1 Reward point for every ₹100 spent through UPI.
  * Book train tickets on SmartBuy and enjoy an additional 5% cashback.
  * Earn 1 Reward Point for every ₹100 spent on every other purchase.


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=IRCT?LGCode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online&icid=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online#nbb "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/irctc-credit-card "Know More")
![image](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/Card-Facia-IRCTC?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card 
  * Fuel up your savings with Fuel Points on every purchase.
  * 1 Fuel point for every Rs. 150 spent through UPI
  * Earn up to 50 litres of free fuel annually.
  * Earn 5% of your spends as Fuel Points at Indian Oil outlets, groceries and bill payments.
  * Earn 1 Fuel Point for every ₹150 spent on all other transactions.
  * Enjoy a 1% fuel surcharge waiver at all IOCL fuel stations across India.


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?channelsource=iocl&LGCode=MKTG&mc_id=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_applyonline_IOCL_CC&icid=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_applyonline_IOCL_CC "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/indianoil-hdfc-bank-credit-card "Know More")
###  Tata Neu Plus HDFC Bank Credit Card 
  * More reasons to shop with extraordinary rewards and savings.
  * 2% back as NeuCoins on Tata Neu and partner Tata Brand Spends
  * Additional 5% back as NeuCoins on Tata Neu Spends, post registering for Tata NeuPass
  * 1% back as NeuCoins on other spends
  * 1 NeuCoin = ₹1, redeemable on Tata Neu App
  * 4 Complimentary Domestic Airport Lounge Access


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=TDCC&Lgcode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online&icid=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online#nbb "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/tata-neu-plus-hdfc-bank-credit-card "Know More")
###  HDFC Bank RuPay Shoppers Stop Credit Card 
  * Make your shopping experience rewarding.
  * 2 First Citizen points for every Rs.150 spent through UPI
  * Earn 6 First Citizen Points for every ₹150 spent on Shoppers Stop private label brands, capped at 500 First Citizen Points per month.
  * Earn 2 First Citizen Points for every ₹150 spent on all other Shoppers Stop brands & other category spends (except fuel & wallet).
  * Complimentary Shoppers Stop membership.


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=FCBH&LGcode=MKTG&utm_content=MKTG&mc_id=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online&icid=website_organic_rupay_cc_apply_online#nbb "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/shoppers-stop-credit-card "Know More")

  * Freedom to take charge of your finances
  * Earn 10X CashPoints on your favourite merchants - Big Basket, BookMyshow, OYO, Swiggy & Uber (maximum of 2,500 CashPoints can be earned in a calendar month).
  * Earn 5X CashPoints on EMI spends at merchant locations (maximum of 2,500 CashPoints can be earned in a calendar month).
  * Earn 1 CashPoint for every ₹150 on other spends (excluding fuel, Wallet / Prepaid Card loads or Voucher Purchases).


[Apply Online (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=RUPY&Lgcode=MKTG&mc_id=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_applyonline&icid=rupay_credit_card_subcatpg_applyonline "Apply Online") [Know More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/freedom-credit-card "Know More")

###  Eligibility Criteria to Apply for A RuPay Credit Card 
  * Age  
Minimum 21 years and maximum 60 years for salaried individuals  
Minimum 21 years and maximum 65 years for self-employed individuals  

  * Nationality  
Applicants must be Indian nationals.  

  * Employment Status  
Salaried professionals or self-employed individuals.  

  * Annual Income  
HDFC Bank assesses eligibility for the Credit Card and determines the credit limit based on the applicant's annual income.


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Benefits of RuPay Credit Cards 
  * Reward Points  
With HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Cards, you can earn reward points on various types of expenses, including groceries, dining, and bill payments.
  * Interest-Free Period  
HDFC Bank provides a 50-day interest-free period on your RuPay Credit Card purchases, allowing you to make payments within a specific timeframe without incurring interest charges.
  * Easy EMI Options  
HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Cards offer the flexibility of converting high-value transactions into easy Equated Monthly Instalments (EMIs).


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  RuPay Credit Card Link with UPI 
  * RuPay Cards are enabled for [UPI payments](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/money-transfer/unified-payment-interface). You can easily link your RuPay Credit Card with various payment apps and use it to transact though UPI.
  * To register for UPI, you need to set up your Credit Card PIN. Just dial 1860 266 0333.
  * Here is how you can link RuPay Card with UPI:
  * Download and open your preferred UPI-enabled app, such as [PayZapp.(opens in a new tab)](https://v.hdfcbank.com/payzapp/index.html)
  * Register your HDFC Bank UPI RuPay Credit Card within the app.
  * Once registered, you can start making UPI payments using your [Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards).


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  How to link HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Card on PayZapp app? 
**Existing PayZapp Users**  
  
Follow these simple steps to link your RuPay Card with UPI:
  * Choose 'RuPay Credit Card' and then select your Credit Card issuer to seamlessly link your RuPay Credit Card.
  * Select 'UPI Accounts' and click on the '+ Add new' option.
  * Log in to your PayZapp account and navigate to the 'Accounts & Cards' section.


**New PayZapp Users**
Follow the provided steps to get started with PayZapp and start using your RuPay Card for UPI payments.
  * Download the PayZapp app from either the Google Play Store or the Apple App Store.
  * Complete the PayZapp registration process.
  * Head to ‘Accounts & Cards’ section and select '+ Add New’ option.
  * Select ‘RuPay Credit Card' to set up your UPI.
  * Choose the 'HDFC Bank Credit Card' to conveniently fetch and link your HDFC Bank RuPay Credit card. 


**Set up your UPI PIN, by following these steps:**
  * Navigate to the PayZapp Home screen.
  * Select 'Accounts & Cards,' then 'UPI Accounts.'
  * Click on the 'Credit Cards' tab.
  * Enter the last 6 digits of your card and its expiry date.
  * Enter the One-Time Password (OTP).
  * Enter your Credit Card PIN.
  * Follow the prompts to set your UPI PIN. 


**Making UPI payments with HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Card**
  * Launch your preferred UPI payment app such as PayZapp.
  * Scan the UPI QR (Quick Response) code of the merchant or enter their details.
  * Input the desired amount and choose your linked RuPay Credit Card.
  * For enhanced convenience, opt for your HDFC Bank RuPay Credit Card account.
  * Enter your UPI PIN to complete the payment.
  * Get the payment confirmation receipt.


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  UPI Transactions via RuPay Credit Card 
  * Only person to merchant (P2M) transactions are allowed when you use your RuPay Credit Card for UPI transactions:
  * Online & Offline Shopping:  
You can make payments at online and offline retail stores, supermarkets, shopping malls, e-commerce websites.
  * Utilities:  
Pay for services like electricity, gas, water, internet, etc., via UPI, using your RuPay Credit Card.
  * Food Deliveries & Dining Out:  
You can pay food establishments or food delivery platforms for their services via UPI.
  * Subscription Services:  
You can pay for multiple subscription services via UPI linked to your RuPay Credit Cards. Plus, you can also set up automatic payments for recurring transactions.
  * Travel Bookings:  
Whether train, flight, bus, travel packages or more, you can make your travel-related bookings via UPI.
  * QR Code Payments:  
You can scan merchant QR codes and pay using UPI linked to your RuPay Credit Card. The transaction amount will be deducted from your RuPay Credit Card’s credit limit and billed to you in the subsequent Credit Card statement.
  * Note: Peer-to-peer (P2P), peer-to-peer merchant (P2M), cash withdrawal at ATMs or merchants, Mutual Funds payments, foreign inward remittances, payments on lending platforms, initial public offering (IPO) subscription and other such payments are not permitted on the UPI linked to the RuPay Credit Card.


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Benefits of UPI transaction through RuPay Credit Card 
  * Easy Bill Payments  
You can conveniently use your RuPay Credit Card for UPI transactions to pay bills, including utility bills, mobile recharge, and more.
  * Earn Rewards  
By using your RuPay Credit Card for UPI payments, you can enjoy the convenience of UPI payments and earn rewards, such as cashback, reward points, or discounts.
  * Credit Card Benefits  
UPI transactions made through your RuPay Credit Card enable you to enjoy card benefits, such as interest-free credit periods, lounge access and insurance coverage, depending on your card type.


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  How Does a RuPay Card Work? 
  * A RuPay Credit Card operates seamlessly with a Chip+PIN technology. With the [Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards)s, you can pay for goods and services based on your promise to pay the bank for the utilised amount along with other charges. You can use the card for online purchases, shopping at POS, purchases on EMI and cash withdrawal from ATMs.


![Smart EMI](https://s7ap1.scene7.com/is/image/hdfcbankPWS/pd-smart-emi?fmt=webp-alpha)
###  Where are RuPay Credit Cards Accepted? 
  * RuPay Credit Cards are widely accepted in India for Point of Sale (PoS) transactions, ATM withdrawals, and e-commerce purchases. They can also be used for international transaction at PoS terminals, ATMs, and e-commerce websites that are enabled for Discover Financial Service (DFS).
